mapper.select:
SELECT agent.id AS agentId, agent.agent_key AS agentKey, agent.agent_name AS agentName, agent.description AS agentDescription, agent.avatar_url AS agentAvatarUrl, agent.agent_type AS agentType, agent.STATUS AS agentStatus,
tenant.id AS tenantId, tenant.tenant_name AS tenantName, tenant.STATUS AS tenantStatus, tenant.nacos_namespace_id AS tenantNacosNamespaceId, tenant.remark AS tenantRemark,
ac.id AS agentConfigId, ac.sys_prompt AS sysPrompt, ac.model_config_id AS modelConfigId, ac.max_iters AS maxIters, ac.compaction_config_json AS compactionConfigJson, ac.workspace_config_json AS workspaceConfigJson, ac.permission_mode AS permissionMode, ac.visual_schema_json AS visualSchemaJson, ac.publish_status AS publishStatus, ac.published_at AS publishedAt,
model.id AS modelId, model.provider AS provider, model.base_URL AS baseUrl, model.api_key AS apiKey, model.model_name AS modelName, model.is_stream AS isStream, model.temperature AS temperature, model.top_p AS topP, model.max_tokens AS maxTokens, model.timeout_ms AS timeoutMs, model.max_attempts AS maxAttempts, model.fallback_model_config_id AS fallbackModelConfigId, model.STATUS AS modelStatus FROM ai_agent agent LEFT JOIN sys_tenant tenant ON agent.tenant_id = tenant.id LEFT JOIN ai_agent_config ac ON ac.agent_id = agent.id LEFT JOIN ai_model_config model ON model.agent_id = agent.id WHERE agent.id = #{agentId} and agent.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and agent.deleted = 0
